name: Visual + Capture Tooling
descriptions: Screenshot/record tooling and visual overlays with deterministic metadata and safe runtime behavior.
success_criteria: Screenshot and recording artifacts are deterministic with metadata sidecars.
Overlays are non-destructive and toggle cleanly.
Capture paths respect render-loop budget constraints.

closeout_criteria.metric_description: Capture/overlay correctness and performance safety score.
hard_no_go_conditions: capture start/stop violates render budget envelope
metadata sidecar missing required provenance fields
overlay toggles alter app state/render semantics
required_commands: uv run pytest tests -k "debug_screenshot or debug_recording or debug_overlay" -q

ci_required_checks: uv run pytest tests -k "debug_screenshot or debug_recording or debug_overlay" -q
